description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the default Docker image with two jobs that run in the default test stage. Add a test job that runs the following script commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-pytest python3-pytest python-mock python3-mock python3-pep8, python3 tests/resources/download_bibles.py, python2 -m pytest -v tests/, python3 -m pytest -v tests/, and python3 -m pep8 --max-line-length=120 tests/ pysword/. Add a pages job that is limited to tag pipelines (only: tags) and runs these script commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-sphinx python-sphinx-rtd-theme, cp README.rst docs/, cd docs, make html, and mv _build/html/ ../public, then publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
